prestazioni: Engine swap to a Toyota 3S-GTE (Gen 3, 2.0L turbo) from a JDM Toyota Caldina GT-T, retaining the original 5-speed E153F transaxle with a custom bellhousing adapter (Mfactory) and upgraded 26-spline axles (Driveshaft Shop) to handle 400+ hp. Turbocharged with a Garrett GTX3071R Gen II (0.63 A/R turbine housing) on a custom tubular manifold (Full-Race Motorsports) with 38mm external wastegate (Tial MV-R).

Full standalone ECU conversion using a Haltech Elite 2500 with individual cylinder fuel control, flex-fuel compatibility (E85), and launch control. Supporting mods include a 1000cc ID1000 injectors (Injector Dynamics), Walbro 450LPH in-tank fuel pump, and a custom 3.5" intercooler core (PWR) with silicone couplings (Samco Sport).

Suspension overhaul with Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (Toyota Cami-specific valving), polyurethane bushings (SuperPro) for the front subframe and rear trailing arms, and a custom 22mm rear sway bar (Whiteline) to reduce body roll. Braking upgraded to DBA 5000 Series rotors (326mm front, 296mm rear) with Ferodo DS2500 pads and stainless steel braided lines (Goodridge).
estetica: Custom widebody conversion using Rocket Bunny V3 (Pandem) fender flares (front + rear) with extended wheel arches to fit 18x9.5" ET+15 (front) and 18x10.5" ET+20 (rear) Work Emotion CR Kiwami wheels, wrapped in 245/40R18 (front) and 275/35R18 (rear) Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires.

Full JDM VIP-inspired aero kit including a custom 3-piece front lip (Tom’s Style), side skirts (C-One), and a duckbill rear spoiler (TRD replica) with carbon fiber construction (Seibon). Paint scheme: Toyota Super White II (040) with matte black accents (3M 1080 Wrap Film) and gold pinstriping (1/8" 3M Scotchcal).

Interior stripped and reupholstered with Bride Zeta III seats (fixed-back, JDM-spec) in black Alcantara with red stitching, paired with a NRG Innovations quick-release steering wheel (350mm, suede) and a custom roll cage (Custom Cages UK, 6-point bolt-in) with harness bar. Shift knob replaced with a titanium Mfactory short shifter (5-speed specific) and weighted shift knob (Defi).
